notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-395 — NEW: a 🤖 auto-pilot run-status line at the top of the "🤖 Auto-pilot · $50k test" tab in 💼 Portfolio. It reads either "✅ Ran today ✓" (with the buy count, or that it scanned and bought nothing), or "⏳ Hasn't run yet today" with the exact reason (signals preparing / no data / download running) and the last completed run date. It also shows the bot's most recent decision (including why nothing was bought). Makes "two quiet days" legible — it IS running, the rules are just selective. Full log still in the 📜 diary (⚙ advanced). Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
